title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at DTDC International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Logistics Manager at DTDC International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
DTDC International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Logistics Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About DTDC International Enterprises:
DTDC International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
